messages.content: Name films like the video game S.T.A.L.K.E.R.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. is a popular video game series, originally released in 2002 through Russian developer GSC Game World. The series has seen multiple sequel releases over the years, the most recent of which is S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2, which released in 2007.
